'''valoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:psephisma|psephisma]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-l-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:psephisma|psephisma]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| valoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vælereth|vælereth]] || [[word:vælerej|vælerej]] || [[word:væleresh|væleresh]] || [[word:vælere|vælere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:valoloroth|valoloroth]] || [[word:valoloroj|valoloroj]] || [[word:valolorosh|valolorosh]] || [[word:valoloro|valoloro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:valoroth|valoroth]] || [[word:valoroj|valoroj]] || [[word:valorosh|valorosh]] || [[word:valoro|valoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:valofroth|valofroth]] || [[word:valofroj|valofroj]] || [[word:valofrosh|valofrosh]] || [[word:valofrof|valofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:valorotho|valorotho]] || [[word:valorojo|valorojo]] || [[word:valorosho|valorosho]] || [[word:valoroko|valoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:valoroth|valoroth]] || [[word:valoroj|valoroj]] || [[word:valorosh|valorosh]] || [[word:valoro|valoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:valorothol|valorothol]] || [[word:valorojol|valorojol]] || [[word:valoroshol|valoroshol]] || [[word:valorokol|valorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:valorothotho|valorothotho]] || [[word:valorojojo|valorojojo]] || [[word:valoroshosho|valoroshosho]] || [[word:valoroko|valoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:valorothon|valorothon]] || [[word:valorojon|valorojon]] || [[word:valoroshon|valoroshon]] || [[word:valorokon|valorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:valorothoro|valorothoro]] || [[word:valorojoro|valorojoro]] || [[word:valoroshoro|valoroshoro]] || [[word:valorokoro|valorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
